declaredRuntimeEndpoints.name: Lab model gateway
declaredRuntimeEndpoints.notes: All model traffic must pass through this lab-approved endpoint.

declaredRuntimeEndpoints.name: Lab model gateway health
declaredRuntimeEndpoints.notes: Optional health endpoint used only by explicit gateway diagnostics and compatibility checks.

declaredRuntimeEndpoints.name: Lab model gateway protocol
declaredRuntimeEndpoints.notes: Protocol selector only; defaults to the lab-owned protocol and can enable OpenAI Chat compatible adapters.

declaredRuntimeEndpoints.name: Lab model gateway adapter auth
declaredRuntimeEndpoints.notes: Optional bearer token for gateway access control; provider keys remain forbidden in the local client.

declaredRuntimeEndpoints.name: Approved host allowlist
declaredRuntimeEndpoints.notes: Only used by explicit policy modes.
